_meta.version: v3 (S37.26) — generated straight from Excel, all 21 championships. No code substitution. | S37.58: remapped 29 circuit-town race cities to nearby major cities (IP safety: Silverstone->Northampton, Monza->Milan, Spa->Liège, etc.). Rally country-bracket cities left as-is.
_meta.note: Keyed by championship id (matches CHAMPIONSHIP_REGISTRY). Round count = rounds.size() for every championship, including GK (21 rounds).
